name: DeepSea Dashboard
compose:
name: slashnode-deepsea
services:
  deepsea:
    image: ghcr.io/retropex/custom-dashboard-ocean:v2.0.4
    container_name: deepsea
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - deepsea_data:/app/data/
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5300:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  deepsea_data:
    name: slashnode-deepsea_deepsea_data
